diff: Target Runway defines the amount of operational expenses Spark holds in reserve as part of the Target SubDAO Proxy Value. The operational expenses component of Target SubDAO Proxy Value counts the higher of past month’s operating expenses multiplied by Target Runway (in months), or total operating expenses incurred in trailing period equal to Target Runway.
